overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a crowded cyberpunk nightclub. The scene transitions from a stage viewing area with golden backlighting, through a teal-lit dance floor, to a neon-pink bar area, and finally into a dimly fluorescent-lit restroom. The environment features futuristic architecture with vibrant neon lighting and dense crowds of NPCs.

events.description: camera slows and stops briefly to observe the DJ performing on stage

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony railing, looking down at the DJ booth and stage below

notable_agents.action: female NPC with white hair and pink top leaning on railing, watching the stage

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow screen with atmospheric fog and stage lighting
DJ booth with turntables and equipment visible below the balcony
black metal safety railing along the balcony edge
array of spotlights and truss structure above the stage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on an upper balcony level of a nightclub, overlooking a DJ stage bathed in golden yellow backlighting. The camera moves along a metal railing past standing patrons, with the DJ equipment visible below through atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dance floor with teal ambient lighting

events.description: lighting shifts from golden stage glow to teal and cyan ambient nightclub lighting
camera weaves through dancing crowd, navigating between NPCs

agents.ego_description: moving through the crowded dance floor, navigating between dancing patrons toward the bar area

notable_agents.action: female NPC with black hair and brown crop top dancing while holding a drink

entered.detail: open concrete floor area with scattered crowd
pink neon strip lighting visible in the distance marking the bar area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the stage and descends into the main dance floor, where teal and cyan lighting replaces the golden glow. The space fills with dense crowds of dancing NPCs as the camera navigates through them toward a distant pink neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar with pink neon accent lighting

events.description: dialogue options appear on screen indicating player interaction choices

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar counter and observing patrons seated on stools

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter serving drinks

entered.detail: long black bar counter with pink neon strip lighting along the edge
round metal stools with patrons seated
backlit shelves filled with bottles behind the bartender
metal door with warning sign leading to restrooms

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the bar area, where pink neon strip lighting accents the counter and patrons sit on stools. The bartender works behind a backlit liquor shelf while the camera approaches, and dialogue options appear indicating potential interactions.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit public restroom with fluorescent lighting

events.description: enters bathroom through metal door, transitioning from neon club to fluorescent restroom
lighting changes from colorful neon to stark greenish fluorescent overhead lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the bathroom door and moving past sinks toward the stalls

notable_agents.action: male NPC in tank top washing hands at the sink

entered.detail: white ceramic tile walls with dark grout lines
row of white porcelain sinks with chrome faucets
large rectangular mirrors above the sinks with fluorescent lighting
dark metal partition walls for toilet stalls

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a metal door into a starkly lit restroom with white tiled walls and fluorescent overhead lighting. The space contains sinks, mirrors, and bathroom stalls, with one NPC washing hands at the sink. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from the vibrant neon club to the utilitarian, dimly lit bathroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant, neon-lit nightclub that eventually transitions into a stark, utilitarian restroom. It begins on an upper balcony overlooking a DJ stage bathed in golden yellow backlighting and atmospheric fog, moving along a metal railing past standing patrons. As the camera turns and descends, the golden glow gives way to teal and cyan lighting on a crowded dance floor filled with dancing NPCs. The scene then shifts toward a pink neon glow as the camera arrives at a bar area featuring backlit liquor shelves and patrons on stools, before moving through a metal door. Finally, the atmosphere transforms dramatically from the colorful club into a dimly lit restroom characterized by white tiled walls and cold fluorescent overhead lighting.
